productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Mairin Brown Casual Shoes
description: When you have the desire to hang out in style, slip into these Mairin casual shoes from buckaroo, and you'll easily be the most fashionable person at the gathering! These smart lace-ups are not just great-looking, but also superly lightweight and comfortable. Pair them with your best pair of jeans and a smart tee to look like a fashionista. Upper Nubuck leather upper for added durability and style Nubuck leather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better support Contrast stitch detailing for added structure and style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Brand logo printed on lateral side Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Leather lining to absorb moisture and keep feet dry Outsole Textured lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption and grip shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
